insp_6ff9c3686a0085d8.spoken: The security panel shows that this door is double-maglocked. It'd be easier to tunnel in through the wall than it would be to break through this thing.

insp_175ce92fff531098.spoken:
There's a note on the door.
"His food is in the crisper drawer. See you next week! -Steven"

insp_ef9d19cec9d9b0bb.spoken: An expensive bottle of scotch. From the color, you'd guess that the contents are at least 50% water.

insp_777b8a0b28f67f0a.spoken: A cheap sign done in block lettering across the door reads: "Hotel closed by authority of new mgmt."

insp_42fd70d0aacc41de.spoken: The cask in this display case is decorated with inlaid panels of ivory scrimshaw.

insp_0160302fa9791554.spoken: The complete skeleton of a theropod dinosaur. It appears to be genuine.

insp_b995b39190617ccb.spoken: A variety of remarkably well-preserved Slavic artifacts.

insp_6a6ccc113be7be0a.spoken:
Executive: Lennart Giesbrecht
Secretary: Annika Schroeder
Secretary: Olsa Siegrderhl

insp_3e1360c27d960831.spoken:
Warning: Toxic Gas Detected
Laboratory Lockdown Engaged

insp_2bb5ce6e1d4078b9.spoken:
Sr. Executive: Lennart Stromberg
Secretary: Annika Schroeder

insp_d18f3382b72226e2.spoken: These crates have been sealed, the only visible markings are "Project Atlas".

insp_9a092ab6b4c28370.spoken: The scientist lays dead beside a small pile of smashed glass, and a number of beakers have been knocked over on the nearby table.

insp_6fac07392aee690e.spoken: Locked. Looks like security has control of the doors again.

insp_baf5d152cee8c31d.spoken: The lock appears to be short circuited.

insp_35266796a2ddecb2.spoken: Cheap corporate art. Looks like marble from a distance, but up close, it's clearly made of injection molded plasticrete.

insp_8a8f3bc818e9d648.spoken: A shoddily-built soykaf shop. Looks like it's closed.

insp_ce555105b2d46d62.spoken: A well used calender is hung on the wall, covered in notes and appointments. June the 29th has been circled about half a dozen times.

insp_75bfc9bdffa3682c.spoken: The bookshelf is neatly organized, and alphabetized. On the upper shelf is a framed picture of a young blonde girl with braces and a huge smile stretching across her face.

insp_93c9c82430cfa6da.spoken: The filing cabinets have all been labeled in neat block printing, by hand. They're all locked.

insp_1e85989d46e19786.spoken: The board is arranged in a grid of names and tasks. Most of which seem to be in the completed catagory. In the corner is a note "Lucy b-day Tues, DO NOT FORGET!!!"

insp_51ca8f58c0f3e611.spoken: Looks like some squatters are living in this station.

insp_061412cc1652571e.spoken: Tunnel's collapsed. Not getting out this way...

insp_8823508a8e46fb4a.spoken: The station's main power is off. The train's not going anywhere until it's back on.

insp_891386e142214bea.spoken: The body on the table looks like a janitor. His chest and stomach appear to have been brutally torn open.

insp_b9e201aefe35de6c.spoken: The body on this operating table has been torn to pieces. The dual arms of an autosurgeon are the obvious culprits.

insp_475ff2cdfdb4006e.spoken: A pile of corpses. The bodies are all dressed in high-quality ballistic armor.

insp_94775b9b5172e1dd.spoken: These metahuman bones have been picked clean.

insp_7e751ccc999eeb99.spoken: This crate appears to have been pried hastily open. There is a partially-torn shipping label on its side. Most of the ink has worn off, but the word "Kreuzbasar" is still clearly visible.

insp_f754f907dcc04917.spoken: These crates don't seem to be part of the shipment that was en route to the Kreuzbasar.

insp_5c9bcb4215425611.spoken: Just full of old simsense recordings.

insp_ba7d57fe9548b1f5.spoken: Smells like something died in here. Upon closer inspection, it's just moldy soy-cakes.

insp_88cd6fa0a98cc539.spoken: The drawers look to be hand-made, out of rusty sheet-metal. Nothing of value catches your eye within.

insp_ef073c788471352b.spoken: Surface access has been welded shut - probably an attempt to keep security tight.

insp_8eb7f399f733db63.spoken: The area is in extreme disrepair. Water is flooding out of the walls and stagnating in pools on the tile floor. You can smell the mildew from here.

insp_8b73ee5aacc2e89f.spoken: The old flourescent grow-lights are barely keeping the plants alive. Almost no light from the surface makes it this far underground.

insp_40c92add47db96b4.spoken: The stairwell down looks to have completely collapsed.

insp_c583a974e2e36426.spoken: On the dresser is a scrap of paper with "Shark Tank" scribbled on it

insp_8bafe8e3cef0512e.spoken: The Communion speaks, and we listen! Give yourself willingly! Join us, and be rewarded!

insp_4d3dabdd3d6e2386.spoken: We are one through the Communion! Join us, and all will be one together!

insp_78e948c8f4147043.spoken: The Communion must flourish, the Communion must grow.

insp_8dff9f77598f4b0c.spoken: Looks like both walls gave way, and they took the roof with them. The entire hallway is blocked with debris.

insp_fb83574ebfbd3a3b.spoken: A blurry photo of Janet, probably taken surreptitiously with a cheap PDA camera. It hangs in a gaudy faux-bronze frame.

insp_1f8a33908d9e6ddf.spoken: There is large crack that runs right though this section of wall.

insp_befddb65b50fa64b.spoken: "ERROR: APEX CONTROL ENTITY SET TO ATTACK ALLIES"

insp_3b361cb4fd8df2cd.spoken: The special today has been crossed out.

insp_d6410b320218470f.spoken: The door has been boarded shut.

insp_caec3868ce09c4e1.spoken: The door is held shut by a magical force.

insp_abf5d770b2c276a5.spoken: Some kind of automatic lockdown system has engaged.

insp_a455e1111fc30c14.spoken: Paul's lifeless body lies crumpled on the floor. The majority of his head has been splattered across the opposite wall.

insp_7dd4b9a0cef9fa40.spoken: The DVD player is completely trashed.

insp_8e5eaab567346aea.spoken: It looks melted. The cargo container is empty.

insp_c4ac0f646ce948ba.spoken: The forklift's tires are flat. Looks like it hasn't been used in years.

insp_a0d038433f87ab43.spoken: Chemical storage barrels. A light jostle shows that they're completely empty.

insp_099d9d9ef02adf30.spoken: The engine's still warm. Colors on the tail clearly mark it as Rammbock property.
